model_id.description: The unique identifier of the trained model.

timeout.description: Controls the amount of time to wait for inference results.

docs.description: An array of objects to pass to the model for inference. The objects should contain a fields matching your configured trained model input. Typically, for NLP models, the field name is `text_field`. Currently, for NLP models, only a single value is allowed.

inference_config.description: The inference configuration updates to apply on the API call

results_field.description: The field that is added to incoming documents to contain the inference prediction. Defaults to predicted_value.

num_top_feature_importance_values.description: Specifies the maximum number of feature importance values per document.

num_top_classes.description: Specifies the number of top class predictions to return. Defaults to 0.

num_top_feature_importance_values.description: Specifies the maximum number of feature importance values per document.

prediction_field_type.description: Specifies the type of the predicted field to write. Acceptable values are: string, number, boolean. When boolean is provided 1.0 is transformed to true and 0.0 to false.

results_field.description: The field that is added to incoming documents to contain the inference prediction. Defaults to predicted_value.

top_classes_results_field.description: Specifies the field to which the top classes are written. Defaults to top_classes.

num_top_classes.description: Specifies the number of top class predictions to return. Defaults to 0.

tokenization.description: The tokenization options to update when inferring

results_field.description: The field that is added to incoming documents to contain the inference prediction. Defaults to predicted_value.

classification_labels.description: Classification labels to apply other than the stored labels. Must have the same deminsions as the default configured labels

tokenization.description: The tokenization options to update when inferring

results_field.description: The field that is added to incoming documents to contain the inference prediction. Defaults to predicted_value.

multi_label.description: Update the configured multi label option. Indicates if more than one true label exists. Defaults to the configured value.

num_top_classes.description: Specifies the number of top class predictions to return. Defaults to 0.

tokenization.description: The tokenization options to update when inferring

results_field.description: The field that is added to incoming documents to contain the inference prediction. Defaults to predicted_value.

question.description: The question to answer given the inference context

max_answer_length.description: The maximum answer length to consider for extraction
